name: NASA Open APIs
description: Access NASA's vast collection of space and astronomy data including Astronomy Picture of the Day (APOD), Mars Rover photos, Near Earth Objects (NEOs), Earth imagery, and more.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: NASA's API provides access to a wealth of space and astronomy data collected by one of the world's leading space agencies. Explore stunning astronomy images, Mars rover photos, near-Earth asteroids, satellite imagery, and much more. Rate limit: 1,000 requests per hour for registered users.

api_key.description: NASA API key for authentication. Get your free key at https://api.nasa.gov/

tools.name: Astronomy Picture of the Day (APOD)
tools.description: Get the Astronomy Picture of the Day, which features a different stunning image or video of our universe each day along with a brief explanation written by a professional astronomer

date.description: The date of the APOD image to retrieve (YYYY-MM-DD format). Defaults to today's date

start_date.description: The start of a date range (YYYY-MM-DD). Used with end_date to retrieve a range of images

end_date.description: The end of a date range (YYYY-MM-DD). Used with start_date to retrieve a range of images

count.description: Number of random images to return (if date parameters are not provided)

thumbs.description: Return the URL of video thumbnail. If an APOD is a video, this will return the thumbnail URL

tools.name: Mars Rover Photos - Curiosity
tools.description: Get photos from NASA's Curiosity Mars rover. Filter by Martian sol (day), Earth date, or camera

sol.description: Martian sol (day) number. Sol 0 is the landing date. Mutually exclusive with earth_date

earth_date.description: Earth date (YYYY-MM-DD). Mutually exclusive with sol

camera.description: Filter by camera: FHAZ (Front Hazard), RHAZ (Rear Hazard), MAST (Mast Camera), CHEMCAM (Chemistry Camera), MAHLI (Hand Lens), MARDI (Descent), NAVCAM (Navigation)

tools.name: Mars Rover Photos - Opportunity
tools.description: Get photos from NASA's Opportunity Mars rover (active 2004-2018). Filter by sol, Earth date, or camera

sol.description: Martian sol (day) number. Sol 0 is the landing date

camera.description: Filter by camera: FHAZ, RHAZ, NAVCAM, PANCAM, MINITES

tools.name: Mars Rover Photos - Perseverance
tools.description: Get photos from NASA's Perseverance Mars rover (landed February 2021). Filter by sol, Earth date, or camera

sol.description: Martian sol (day) number. Sol 0 is February 18, 2021

camera.description: Filter by camera: EDL_RUCAM, EDL_RDCAM, EDL_DDCAM, EDL_PUCAM1, EDL_PUCAM2, NAVCAM_LEFT, NAVCAM_RIGHT, MCZ_RIGHT, MCZ_LEFT, FRONT_HAZCAM_LEFT_A, FRONT_HAZCAM_RIGHT_A, REAR_HAZCAM_LEFT, REAR_HAZCAM_RIGHT, SKYCAM, SHERLOC_WATSON

tools.name: Mars Rover Manifest
tools.description: Get mission manifest for a Mars rover including mission details, available photos, and statistics

rover_name.description: Name of the rover: curiosity, opportunity, spirit, or perseverance

tools.name: Near Earth Objects (NEO) Feed
tools.description: Get a list of Near Earth Objects (asteroids) within a date range. Returns asteroid data including close approach dates, estimated diameter, and potential hazard status

start_date.description: Start date for asteroid search (YYYY-MM-DD). Maximum 7 days range

end_date.description: End date for asteroid search (YYYY-MM-DD). Maximum 7 days from start_date

tools.name: Near Earth Objects (NEO) Lookup
tools.description: Look up a specific Near Earth Object (asteroid) by its NASA JPL small body ID. Returns detailed information including orbital data, close approach dates, and physical characteristics

asteroid_id.description: NASA JPL small body ID of the asteroid (e.g., '3542519' for 2010 PK9)

tools.name: Near Earth Objects (NEO) Browse
tools.description: Browse the overall Near Earth Object data set. Returns paginated list of all asteroids in the database

page.description: Page number to retrieve (20 asteroids per page)

tools.name: Earth Imagery
tools.description: Retrieve satellite imagery of Earth for a specific location and date. Returns Landsat 8 imagery

date.description: Date of image (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to most recent available

dim.description: Width and height of image in degrees. Max 0.025

tools.name: Earth Assets
tools.description: Get available Earth imagery assets for a specific location and date range. Returns metadata about available Landsat imagery

tools.name: EPIC - Earth Polychromatic Imaging Camera
tools.description: Get metadata for the most recent natural color imagery from DSCOVR's EPIC camera. EPIC provides full disc imagery of Earth taken from the L1 Lagrange point

tools.name: EPIC - Natural Color by Date
tools.description: Get natural color Earth imagery metadata for a specific date from EPIC camera

tools.name: EPIC - Enhanced Color
tools.description: Get metadata for the most recent enhanced color imagery from EPIC camera. Enhanced color uses different wavelengths to highlight vegetation

tools.name: EPIC - Enhanced Color by Date
tools.description: Get enhanced color Earth imagery metadata for a specific date from EPIC camera

tools.name: DONKI - Solar Flare
tools.description: Get Solar Flare data from DONKI (Space Weather Database Of Notifications, Knowledge, Information). Returns solar flare events with peak time, class, and associated data

startDate.description: Start date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30 days prior to current date

endDate.description: End date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current date

tools.name: DONKI - Coronal Mass Ejection (CME)
tools.description: Get Coronal Mass Ejection (CME) data - large expulsions of plasma and magnetic field from the Sun's corona. Returns CME events with speed, half angle, and catalog data

startDate.description: Start date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30 days prior to current date

endDate.description: End date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current date

tools.name: DONKI - CME Analysis
tools.description: Get Coronal Mass Ejection Analysis data including speed, half angle, and catalog. Provides more detailed analysis than the basic CME endpoint

startDate.description: Start date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30 days prior to current date

endDate.description: End date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current date

mostAccurateOnly.description: Return only the most accurate CME analysis entries

catalog.description: CME catalog to search: ALL, SWRC_CATALOG, or JANG_ET_AL_CATALOG

tools.name: DONKI - Geomagnetic Storm (GST)
tools.description: Get Geomagnetic Storm data - disturbances in Earth's magnetosphere caused by solar wind. Returns storm events with Kp index and linked CME data

startDate.description: Start date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30 days prior to current date

endDate.description: End date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current date

tools.name: DONKI - Interplanetary Shock (IPS)
tools.description: Get Interplanetary Shock data - shock waves traveling through the solar wind. Returns shock events with location, catalog, and linked CME data

startDate.description: Start date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30 days prior to current date

endDate.description: End date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current date

location.description: Filter by observation location: ALL, Earth, MESSENGER, STEREO A, or STEREO B

catalog.description: Catalog to search: ALL, SWRC_CATALOG, or WINSLOW_MESSENGER_ICME_CATALOG

tools.name: DONKI - Solar Energetic Particle (SEP)
tools.description: Get Solar Energetic Particle events - high-energy particles ejected from the Sun during flares and CMEs. These events can be hazardous to spacecraft and astronauts

startDate.description: Start date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30 days prior to current date

endDate.description: End date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current date

tools.name: DONKI - Magnetopause Crossing (MPC)
tools.description: Get Magnetopause Crossing data - events where the solar wind pushes Earth's magnetopause boundary significantly inward, potentially impacting satellites in geosynchronous orbit

startDate.description: Start date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30 days prior to current date

endDate.description: End date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current date

tools.name: DONKI - Radiation Belt Enhancement (RBE)
tools.description: Get Radiation Belt Enhancement data - events where energetic electrons in Earth's outer radiation belt are significantly elevated, posing risks to satellites

startDate.description: Start date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30 days prior to current date

endDate.description: End date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current date

tools.name: DONKI - High Speed Stream (HSS)
tools.description: Get High Speed Stream data - fast solar wind streams originating from coronal holes that can trigger geomagnetic activity when they impact Earth

startDate.description: Start date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30 days prior to current date

endDate.description: End date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current date

tools.name: DONKI - WSA-ENLIL Solar Wind Simulation
tools.description: Get WSA-ENLIL Solar Wind Cone Model simulation data - a large-scale, physics-based prediction model of the solar wind used to forecast CME arrival times at Earth

startDate.description: Start date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30 days prior to current date

endDate.description: End date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current date

tools.name: DONKI - Notifications
tools.description: Get DONKI space weather notifications - official alerts, watches, and warnings issued by space weather forecasters for geomagnetic storms, solar radiation storms, and radio blackouts

startDate.description: Start date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 7 days prior to current date

endDate.description: End date for search (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current date

type.description: Filter by notification type: all, FLR, SEP, CME, IPS, MPC, GST, RBE, report
